name: Loop Body
description: Executes logic for each index in a provided list. Simulates loop body behavior in a single execution pass.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    # Robustly handle uninitialized inputs
    indices = inputs.get('indices')
    if indices is None: indices = []
    
    op = inputs.get('operation')
    if op is None: op = ""
    
    self.log_info(f"Executing loop body for {len(indices)} items.")
    
    results = []
    for i in indices:
        # Simulation of a sub-graph execution
        self.log_info(f"Loop Iteration: index={i}")
        results.append(i)
        
    return {'results': results}
